channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 170,000 — Priced to go! Finish to taste house in upmarket neighborhood (Sandton Park, Harare West)
item.description: USD 170,000 — Sandton Park, Harare West. 5 beds, 5 baths. Priced to go! Finish to taste house in upmarket neighborhood. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
